top3.sql:
SELECT f.`Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)`, f.`District Code`
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE s.CDSCode IN (
    SELECT CDSCode
    FROM schools
    WHERE LOWER(SUBSTR(School, 1, INSTR(School || ' ', ' ') - 1)) = 'alusine'
);

SELECT f.`Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)`, f.`District Code`
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE s.CDSCode IN (
    SELECT CDSCode
    FROM schools
    WHERE LOWER(SUBSTR(School, 1, INSTR(School || ' ', ' ') - 1)) = 'alusine'
);

SELECT f.`Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)`, f.`District Code`
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE s.School LIKE 'Alusine %' OR s.School = 'Alusine';

SELECT f.`Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)`, f.`District Code`
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE s.CDSCode IN (
    SELECT CDSCode
    FROM schools
    WHERE LOWER(SUBSTR(School, 1, INSTR(School || ' ', ' ') - 1)) = 'alusine'
);

SELECT f.`Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)`, f.`District Code`
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE s.CDSCode IN (
    SELECT CDSCode
    FROM schools
    WHERE INSTR(School, 'Alusine') > 0
);

SELECT f.`Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)`, f.`District Code`
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE s.School LIKE 'Alusine %' OR s.School = 'Alusine';

final.sql:
SELECT f.`Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)`, f.`District Code`
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE s.CDSCode IN (
    SELECT CDSCode
    FROM schools
    WHERE LOWER(SUBSTR(School, 1, INSTR(School || ' ', ' ') - 1)) = 'alusine'
);
